title: Review the risks of changing Kernel design to be /vote-first in /Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public. Identify which executable checks, docs, or launcher behaviors would break or become misleading if /kernel remains co-equal. Return prioritized findings and recommended test set. Do not edit...
summary_text: Yes. Push the archive branch first so the dirty-source recovery point (`9499be6c7`) is durable beyond `/private/tmp`, then mark PR #639 ready for review while checks are green to improve visibility and reduce drift risk; stopping short of merge is a safe control point that preserves optionality for one more human pass without losing momentum or traceability.
